purpose: Source-driven refresh design: which source updates which entity type, at what cadence, by what method. Extends layer 08 (quarterly blueprint) with per-source automation.

sources.method: scripts/pib_index.py --update (EXISTS, policy repo; POST to www.pib.gov.in only)
scheme-page scrape; the only official company-facing aggregator
homepage notice diff -- registration currently STOPPED (oversubscribed); resumes only if rejections free funds

updates: BudgetObservation-analog: FDI equity inflow by sector/state
sources.method: dpiit.gov.in publications PDF -> table extract; joins to fdi_vs_pli bulletin

updates: forex context, FDI flows BoP basis
sources.method: enumerable public archive to 1998, no key
per-route: headless-WP wp-json | backend APIs | browser for JS shells; OCR for scanned gazettes

sources.source: Company data -- CURRENT: Damodaran annual + yfinance + screener.in
Company data -- TARGET: Orbis (Bureau van Dijk)
updates: Company (ownership trees, GUO, financials for unlisted), Pairing (subsidiary->parent mapping)
sources.method: SUBSCRIPTION REQUIRED -- no free API; when licensed, match by BvD-ID<->(ticker,ISIN); until then unlisted-company coverage is the twin's known gap
free_proxies: MCA master data (company registrations, paid docs)

sources.source: State portals incentive dashboards (Gujarat IFP 'Incentives Granted', Assam KYI, J&K KYI, Jharkhand)

pipeline: 1. Fetch per source on cadence -> raw snapshot (dated file)
2. Extract -> Observation rows against canonical model (00_data_model)
3. Diff vs current Instrument/Window state -> proposed changes
4. Corrections DISPLAYED: prior value retained with superseded_on date
5. Rebuild flat_instrument_index + bulletins; quarterly: Trade Watch + series append

event_driven: PIB new Cabinet approval matching instrument keywords
gazette upload on tracked policy pages
